PAINTER-CURSED_POWER.title: Cursed
PAINTER-CURSED_POWER.description: When a Color is painted, lose {0} HP. Reduced by half at the start of your turn.
PAINTER-CURSED_POWER.smartDescription: When a Color is painted, lose {0} HP. Reduced by half at the start of your turn.
PAINTER-ACCURSED_AGGRESSION_POWER.title: Accursed Aggression
PAINTER-ACCURSED_AGGRESSION_POWER.descri: Whenever an enemy attacks you, apply {0} Cursed to it.
PAINTER-ACCURSED_AGGRESSION_POWER.smartD: Whenever an enemy attacks you, apply {0} Cursed to it.
PAINTER-BLOOD_BRUSH_POWER.title: Blood Brush
PAINTER-BLOOD_BRUSH_POWER.description: When you take unblocked attack damage, Paint {0} random Color(s).
PAINTER-BLOOD_BRUSH_POWER.smartDescripti: When you take unblocked attack damage, Paint {0} random Color(s).
PAINTER-DUPLICATE_DRAWING_POWER.title: Duplicate Drawing
PAINTER-DUPLICATE_DRAWING_POWER.descript: Your next {0} Painting(s) are played twice.
PAINTER-DUPLICATE_DRAWING_POWER.smartDes: Your next {0} Painting(s) are played twice.
PAINTER-FANTASY_FORM_POWER.title: Fantasy Form
PAINTER-FANTASY_FORM_POWER.description: When you play a Painting, Paint {0} of each Color on it.
PAINTER-FANTASY_FORM_POWER.smartDescript: When you play a Painting, Paint {0} of each Color on it.
PAINTER-GROWING_GREENS_POWER.title: Growing Greens
PAINTER-GROWING_GREENS_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, Paint {0} Green.
PAINTER-GROWING_GREENS_POWER.smartDescri: At the end of your turn, Paint {0} Green.
PAINTER-HUE_HUFFER_POWER.title: Hue Huffer
PAINTER-HUE_HUFFER_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, Paint {0} random Color(s) for each Painting played this turn.
PAINTER-HUE_HUFFER_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, Paint {0} random Color(s) for each Painting played this turn.
PAINTER-PAINT_PROFUSION_POWER.title: Paint Profusion
PAINTER-PAINT_PROFUSION_POWER.descriptio: When you draw a Painting, draw {0} card(s).
PAINTER-PAINT_PROFUSION_POWER.smartDescr: When you draw a Painting, draw {0} card(s).
PAINTER-PAINTBALL_PELT_POWER.title: Paintball Pelt
PAINTER-PAINTBALL_PELT_POWER.description: When you draw a Painting, deal {0} damage to ALL enemies.
PAINTER-PAINTBALL_PELT_POWER.smartDescri: When you draw a Painting, deal {0} damage to ALL enemies.
PAINTER-SATANIC_SURGE_POWER.title: Satanic Surge
PAINTER-SATANIC_SURGE_POWER.description: Cursed is not reduced at the start of your next turn.
PAINTER-SATANIC_SURGE_POWER.smartDescrip: Cursed is not reduced at the start of your next turn.
PAINTER-TREASURE_TROVE_POWER.title: Treasure Trove
PAINTER-TREASURE_TROVE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add {0} random Uncommon card(s) to your hand.
PAINTER-TREASURE_TROVE_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, add {0} random Uncommon card(s) to your hand.
PAINTER-AUTO_PAINTER_POWER.title: Auto Painter
PAINTER-AUTO_PAINTER_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, Paint {0} of a Color.
PAINTER-AUTO_PAINTER_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of your turn, Paint {0} of a Color.
